title: Make.com scenario runtime error []null

posts.author: endereeh (Ender Eskinazi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 3 scenarios which are built the same trigger (whatch board’s items- each board linked to a different form- and from there list group’s items from another board then update the listed board. 2 of the scenarios are working perfectly.

The last scenario gives an error message and stops before the update module.
The error is Runtime Error Null. Please help me identify the problem and fix it. I checked everything and compared all the scenarios step by step but I couldn’t find any difference that would cause this error.

Has anyone had null errors before?

Thanks for your suggestions
